title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Birla Tyres Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Birla Tyres Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birla Tyres Holdings Services:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres Holdings Services!
